title: hieracium incisum subsp. pallescens
intro: Hieracium incisum subsp. pallescens is a plant species, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, which is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium incisum subsp. pallescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
